name: RebarMesh.RebarMeshTypeEnum
summary: The different types of reinforcement meshes.

enum_values.name: UNKNOWN_MESH
enum_values.summary: The type of the mesh is unknown.

enum_values.name: RECTANGULAR_MESH
enum_values.summary: The shape of the mesh is rectangular.

enum_values.name: POLYGON_MESH
enum_values.summary: The shape of the mesh is a polygon. Create rectangular meshes also as polygon meshes.

enum_values.name: BENT_MESH
enum_values.summary: The shape of the mesh is bent.
